data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Inventory tracking', but the evidence does not confirm that inventory is decremented at the appropriate time. While the linked use case states that inventory decrements when an order is placed, there is no evidence provided that explicitly demonstrates this behavior in the system. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm the inventory tracking mechanism leads to a gap in validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming that inventory is decremented when an order is placed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
